title: Future Rounds and Ongoing Standardization
description: Explore the ongoing NIST PQC work including Round 4 candidates, additional signature schemes, and the evolving standardization landscape.
learningObjectives: Identify Round 4 KEM candidates still under evaluation
Understand the new signature scheme call and its purpose
Analyze the rationale for continued standardization efforts
Evaluate potential future additions to the PQC portfolio
Anticipate the evolving PQC standards landscape
